rationale: The cited paper is not a generic background item: its core focus is SKU availability consistency and consumer choice, which directly overlaps the citing paper’s core constructs of temporary recurring out-of-stock effects on SKU choice and intertemporal/contextual availability effects. Given this strong topical/mechanism overlap and an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.39.3.304.19106), this pair is plausibly substantive and should be kept for full relation judgment.
